description_for_human: Compliance signature management platform for collecting legally defensible digital signatures.
description_for_model: Attestly is a SaaS platform that helps organizations collect digital signatures for compliance documents, policies, NDAs, and training acknowledgments. Key features include one-click signing (no accounts needed), audit trails with timestamps and IP addresses, automated reminders, and PDF proof generation. Pricing starts at $29/month after a 14-day free trial.
